Given: user is on login page
When: user enters username "hyphen_admin@acmetest.com" and clicks SEND VERIFICATION CODE, receives code "34067", and clicks LOG IN
Then: User is authenticated and redirected to dashboard with active session

Given: user is on login page
When: user enters username "invalid@test.com" and password "wrongpassword" and clicks LOG IN button
Then: System displays "Invalid credentials" error and user remains on login page

Given: user is logged in with active session
When: user remains inactive for 30 minutes
Then: Session expires automatically and user is redirected to login page with timeout message

Given: user is on login page
When: user clicks FORGOT PASSWORD link
Then: Password reset form is displayed with email input field

Given: user has received password reset email
When: user enters verification code from email
And: user enters new password "NewPass@123", confirms password, and submits form
Then: System updates password and user can login with new credentials

Given: user is already logged in to application
When: user navigates to Create Post Page
Then: Page title is "Betterworks Engage - Create Post"

Given: user is on Create Post Page
When: user clicks CREATE NEW POST BUTTON
And: user fills post title and content, selects audience and tags, and clicks PUBLISH POST button
Then: New post appears in feed with correct metadata and visibility settings

Given: user is on Create Post Page with unsaved content
When: user clicks SAVE AS DRAFT button
Then: Post is saved to drafts folder and appears with timestamp and auto-save indication

Given: user is on Profile Settings page
When: user updates display name field
And: user uploads new profile picture and clicks SAVE button
Then: Profile changes are persisted and visible immediately to user and others

Given: user is on Account Security page
When: user enters current password for verification
And: user enters new password "NewSecure@456", confirms new password, and clicks UPDATE PASSWORD button
Then: Password is successfully changed and takes effect on next login

Given: user is on registration form
When: user enters invalid email format "notanemail"
Then: System displays "Please enter a valid email address" error message

Given: user is on form with required fields marked
When: user leaves mandatory fields empty
Then: Form displays specific error messages for each missing required field

Given: user with admin role is logged in
When: user navigates to Admin Dashboard
Then: Dashboard loads with admin controls showing analytics, user management, and system settings

Given: user with regular user role is logged in
When: user tries to access Admin Dashboard URL directly
Then: System displays "Access Denied" error and redirects user to home page

Given: user is on home page with search box visible
When: user enters search query "project management"
Then: Posts matching search query appear ranked by relevance

Given: user is on home page
When: user enters search query with no matches "xyzabc12345"
Then: Message "No posts found" appears with suggestion to refine search

Given: user is editing a document
When: user makes changes to document content
Then: New version is created with timestamp and previous version is preserved for revert

Given: user is viewing a document
When: user clicks VERSION HISTORY button
Then: Version timeline displays all previous versions with creation time and author info

Given: user is on Requirements module
When: user clicks CREATE REQUIREMENT button
And: user fills requirement title and description, assigns priority level, and submits
Then: New requirement appears in tracking list with unique ID and status

Given: user is viewing a requirement
When: user clicks on status dropdown
Then: Requirement status is updated and change is logged with timestamp and notified to stakeholders
